title: Senior Teacher - American Institute - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - American Institute - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the American Institute family as a Senior Teacher in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About American Institute:
American Institute is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with American Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
